postmark.Subject: Construction loan — David Okafor
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Construction loan for David Okafor on bare-land lot at 52 Winston Churchill Boulevard, Mississauga, ON L5M 4Y1.

Land value (current): $280,000
Construction cost: $620,000 (4-draw schedule)
Projected completion value: $900,000
Loan amount: $620,000
LTV-to-completion: 69%

Builder: Okafor Construction (borrower is owner-builder; 12 years building experience).

Know Vienna's typical flow is for completed-property mortgages — let me know if construction is in-scope or if we should route differently.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
